prompt: Using the provided reference image as the base, transform the scene into a dramatic nocturnal version while preserving the snow leopard’s airborne leap, the snowy cliff setting, the vertical poster composition, and the painterly fantasy-realism detail. Change the warm golden palette into a cold deep-blue moonlit atmosphere, replace the gold sun/planet backdrop with a small realistic full moon in the upper right, and make the leopard appear more front-facing and confident as it springs forward toward the viewer. Add icy rim lighting around the fur, sharper blue eyes, wind-swept white motion trails, snow spray, mist, and darker high-contrast snowy mountain peaks below. Keep the ornate textured background feel but make it subtle and dark, with no text, watermark, or extra animals. Render in crisp 4K quality, cinematic fantasy wildlife art, highly detailed fur, dramatic lighting, vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.
